references.text: Duyfjes, BEE. 1993. Stemonaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 11: 399-409

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 June 2024

species.citation: (R.Br.) Duyfjes , Blumea 36 (1991) 243 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 404; ≡ Dioscorea lucida R.Br. , Prodr. Fl. Nov. Holland. (1810) 295; Type: from Queensland. = Stemona philippinensis Merr. , Publ. Bur. Sci. Gov. Lab. 6 (1904) 16 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 201; Type: Merrill 3061 (K, holo), Masbate.
species.distribution: Australia, New Guinea, Philippines. CEBU, MASBATE, MINDANAO: Zamboanga del Norte (photos), TICAO.
species.notes: Rather dry places in monsoon areas, in scrub, open forest, dry gallery forest, an on roadsides. 0-200m.

species.citation: Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 404 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 202; Buysen, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 405; Type: No specimen found, the illustration in Rumph., Herb. Amb. 5 (1747) 365 “Ubi Gorita nigrum”, t. 129, serving as lectotype. var. moluccana (Blume), ined.; ≡ Roxburghia moluccana Blume, Enum. Pl. Javae (1827) 9. = Stemona tuberosa var. ternatensis (J.J.Sm.) Duyfjes, Blumea 36 (1991) 243; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 11 (1993) 405; ≡ Stemona moluccana var. ternatensis J.J.Sm., Bull. Jard. Bot. Buitenzorg, 3rd Sér. 6 (1924) 73; Type: from Ternate. Distribution: Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines. Notes: Not far from the coast. 0(-?)m. Native. var. tuberosa. Distribution: China, Continental Asia, Lesser Sunda Isls, Philippines, Taiwan. Native.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, China, India, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Benguet, NCR, PALAWAN (photos).
